/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/test_vmm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/vmm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/serial_console.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_parameter_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_quantum_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_gpu_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_network_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_mirror_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_vpu_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_vmm.dir/kernel/vmm/virtual_sllm_device.cpp.o -o test_vmm
